crawler.title: Statistics crawler
crawler.intro: Collects matches of top players (Challenger / Grandmaster / Master{{diamond}}) into a local database and computes pairwise champion matchups. Pick recommendations and the overall tier list are built on this data. Speed is ~1400 matches/hour (it also pulls the timeline for item build order). Progress is saved — you can stop and resume.
crawler.resetDb: Reset the database and recollect (needed after a schema update)
crawler.etaHelp: Estimated time to target: ~{{hours}} h. The Riot dev key expires every 24 hours — if the crawler stops with a 401 error, refresh the key in Settings and click "Resume collection" (it continues from where it left off). A Personal API Key does not expire.
crawler.needApiKey: Enter a Riot API key in Settings and save it.
